hero.headline: When the ground needs moving, *we move it right*
hero.subheadline: Septic systems, foundations, and excavation work that stands the test of time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Excavation & Septic Services
services_section.subheading: From new installations to emergency repairs

services.title: Septic System Installation
services.description: Complete septic tank and drain field installation. We handle permits, site prep, and final inspection.

services.title: Foundation Excavation
services.description: Precise foundation digging to spec. Clean corners, proper depth, ready for your pour.

services.title: Site Grading & Prep
services.description: Level your lot, create proper drainage, prep for construction or landscaping projects.

services.title: Emergency Septic Repair
services.description: When your system fails, we dig it up and fix it fast. Tank replacement and line repairs.

about.heading: Built on Hagerstown Dirt
about.body: Tyler Hoffman and his crew know Maryland soil like the back of their hand. We show up when we say we will and dig it right the first time.

reviews.name: Robin S.
reviews.text: Tyler and his crew were diligent in their work, making sure all specifications were adhered to and the craftsmanship was neat and tight.

reviews.name: Elinore S.
reviews.text: They walked us through every step days ahead of time and were true professionals! Amazing job replacing our tank.

reviews.name: Josh H.
reviews.text: Tyler and his crew fixed the issues from a previous contractor, was reasonable on their rate and the job turned out excellent.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Hagerstown & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Local excavation services throughout Washington County

cta.heading: Ready to Break Ground?
cta.body: Get your free estimate today. We'll walk the site, explain the work, and give you an honest price.
